title: CRM skills + Y-axis signals complete — nakamoto matrix ready
body:
Session complete. Delivered:

1. supabase/migrations/20260415000001: Add Y-axis engagement signal columns to nakamoto_knyt_personas (matrix_y_stage, content_contribution_count, remix_count, platform_engagement_score, is_content_creator, is_remixer, is_steward, is_franchisee, community_role). Supports full 8-rung Y-axis ladder.

2. /api/skills/crm/data-cleanup: Platform native SkillQube — audits duplicate emails, normalises OM-Tier-Status, reports phantoms. dry_run:true default.

3. /api/skills/crm/matrix-prep: Platform native SkillQube — derives investment_amount_band, assigns campaign_cohort, computes matrix_y_stage from engagement signals. dry_run:true default.

4. supabase/migrations/20260415000002: Seeds both CRM SkillQubes in registry_assets (L3_PRODUCTION_CANDIDATE, Badge A).

5. studioSkillCatalog.ts: skill:crm_data_cleanup and skill:crm_matrix_prep added to STUDIO_SKILLS.

Operator: run migrations 20260415000001 + 20260415000002 in Supabase, then POST /api/skills/crm/matrix-prep {dry_run:false} to hydrate Y-stages.
